hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen on active-site motif (atop/bridge/hollow) and the mean adsorbate–first-shell metal distance will at least double, relative to the current (S,E,L)-only model, the fraction of generated HEA local compositions whose DFT-calculated adsorption energies for *O and *OH fall within ±0.10 eV of the target E after mapping to valid microstates under identical OC20 pretraining and LoRA fine-tuning.
